'''Vanlin''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Kiffar/Legends|Kiffar]] and a member of the [[Kiffu Guardians]]. In [[30 BBY/Legends|30 BBY]] he and [[Horsea]] shot down a [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] ship that had been piloted by [[Merglyn]] and [[Havor]], who were attempting to smuggle a shipment of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] onto [[Kiffex/Legends|Kiffex]].
